OmniUiCard.name: LSAPAllAvailablePrograms1
OmniUiCard.sampleDataSourceResponse: { "AvailablePrograms": true, "AllPrograms": { "ID": "AllPrograms", "isAppealActive": false, "HasActiveCommercialIns": true, "Country": "US", "IsRecommended": true, "Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__ProgramName": "Diabetes Copay Assistance Program", "Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__IsInclusionRule": true, "showReapply": true, "Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__RecommendedProgramPriority": 1, "Financial_Assistance_Program_Eligibility__IsInclusionRule": true, "ProgramName": "Diabetes Copay Assistance Program", "ProgramId": "11WSM0000000rsL2AQ", "RuleType": "Eligibility", "MinimumAge": 83, "Financial_Assistance_Program_Eligibility__ProgramId": "11WSM0000000rsL2AQ", "Financial_Assistance_Program_Recommendation__ProgramSummary": "This is to provide copay assistance for the patients who are suffering from diabetes", "Status": "Rejected" }, "AssistanceHistory": false, "Applications": false, "CareProgramEnrolleeName": "Bob Johnson" }
